use_codes.desc: USE IN ADULT AND PEDIATRIC PATIENTS WITH SUBOPTIMAL ECHOCARDIOGRAMS TO OPACIFY THE LEFT VENTRICULAR CHAMBER AND TO IMPROVE THE DELINEATION OF THE LEFT VENTRICULAR ENDOCARDIAL BORDER
USE IN ULTRASONOGRAPHY OF THE URINARY TRACT IN PEDIATRIC PATIENTS FOR THE EVALUATION OF SUSPECTED OR KNOWN VESICOURETERAL REFLUX
USE WITH ULTRASOUND OF THE LIVER IN ADULT AND PEDIATRIC PATIENTS TO CHARACTERIZE FOCAL LIVER LESIONS

indications.text:
Lumason is indicated for use in patients with suboptimal echocardiograms to opacify the left ventricular
chamber and to improve the delineation of the left ventricular endocardial border.

Echocardiography
Lumason is indicated for use in adult and pediatric patients with suboptimal
echocardiograms to opacify the left ventricular chamber and to improve the delineation
of the left ventricular endocardial border.
